> PhD Candidate at National Taiwan University Â· Presentation Coach Â· Science Communicator

## About

Ching-Wei (Matt) Ye (è‘‰æ·¨ç¶­) is a PhD candidate in Occupational Science and Occupational Therapy at National Taiwan University, researching AI-assisted cognitive impairment diagnosis combining neuroimaging and machine learning.

He is also a presentation coach and science communicator with 150+ talks across 20+ organizations, specializing in helping researchers and professionals communicate complex ideas clearly.

ORCID: 0009-0001-6085-8303

- Writing: https://mattye.dev/writing

## Writing Columns

- Hardcore Presentation (ç¡¬æ ¸ç°¡å ±): A column on the science of presentation and communication, drawing on cognitive science, neuroaesthetics, linguistics, design theory, and occupational therapy. Each piece moves from practical technique to applied scenario to underlying theory and cited literature. https://mattye.dev/writing?series=ç¡¬æ ¸ç°¡å ±
